channel.title: Platform-Engineering on Mattia Mondin
channel.description: Recent content in Platform-Engineering on Mattia Mondin

item.title: Defining CUJ SLOs: A Process Framework
item.description: An end-to-end framework for defining Critical User Journey SLOs, from business strategy to operational review.

item.title: Observability Prerequisites for SLO Implementation
item.description: A structured approach to resolving the instrumentation-before-measurement dependency when rolling out SLOs.

item.title: CUJ SLO Implementation Assessment
item.description: An honest assessment of implementing CUJ SLOs at scale: what was delivered, what constrained delivery, and recommendations for the long term.
